entry.title: A Nice Little Weekend Get-Away
entry.summary:
Author: velvet_alchemist

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,137Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 12

Summary: Disclaimer: BDSM I think is good for trauma healing with trusted partners, so keep that in mind. :) come at this with an open mind and heart and a change of panties anyways- you’re about to get railed by two beefcakes bc you want to. Also, also- this is a SCENE. Everything here is by actively consenting adult parties, there is NO non-con going on here.

entry.title: The Son of Nightwing
entry.summary:
Author: Dewdropwifu

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 32,943Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 331

Summary: Dick Grayson leaves everything behind again to have his own life in Bludhaven. He leaves behind a heartbroken Y/n, who is unknowingly pregnant. With a broken heart, she finds solace in Jason. During Levi Grayson's second birthday, his father returns, setting family tension high. and awakening Y/n's old feelings. Can the Batfamily put everything aside for their beloved baby family member? What dangers lie ahead for Levi? With Y/n's heart torn two different ways, can she make the right decision for not only her heart but for her baby boy too? (This is essentially a reworking of my Son of a God series but with the DCU. I'm going a different way with this one.)

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Come as a Lover, Come as an Exeuctioner
entry.summary:
Author: dalgikiss

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 78,176Chapters: 53/54Kudos: 399

Summary: [Jason Todd x fem!spoiled!girly!civilian!reader] you are a ghost as i am a ghost, but i am banging cabinets and tv static and all you’ve ever been is silent // in which Bruce's spoiled daughter is loved beyond measure and jason is unsure where he fits in a world that she isn't allowed to know exists. But he's has never been good at walking away from things that could break him.

entry.title: OMNISCIENT
entry.summary:
Author: jennysketchup

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,917Chapters: 7/45Kudos: 62

Summary: Death and Destiny are star-crossed lovers; they're bound for eternity but are subject to Fate and her imposing presence. You were once an admirer of Fate; the idea of an inescapable future buried a sense of security within you. That was until fate decided it had other plans for you. Gosh... you hate being OMNISCIENT.

entry.title: Baby’s First Creature-Feature
entry.summary:
Author: TheGoldenPath

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 40,889Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 70

Summary: Excerpt~She’s reading to him, a generator manual that looks well read. The pages are yellow and water stained around her long fingers. His vision lazily trails from the book to his bloodied sheets and back to the stranger. Is he hallucinating a comforting presence to make his reality less burdensome? When had his visions ever been pleasant?A pretty girl to sit by his bedside and comfort him in his death. He tries to reach out and touch her hand, just to see if she’s a fantasy meant to remind him of everything he never fully had only for the pain to jolt up his entire abdomen. Summary~Jason awakes on an alternate earth whose only occupants is a secretive girl and a strange dog. He struggles to bring them home as a presence works in the shadows to control them. He learns the hard way that some secrets are best left alone. Dedicated to all the fawns that had to grow sharp teeth so they could defend themselves❤️

entry.title: Apartment 3B
entry.summary:
Author: ElaineInABox

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 77,210Chapters: 20/22Kudos: 975

Summary: You weren’t looking for love, just somewhere cheap, quiet, and safe enough to get you through the semester. Jason Todd wasn’t looking for company, just a roommate who wouldn’t ask questions about why he came home at two AM bloody and bruised.But in a cramped apartment in Crime Alley, between burnt coffee, leaky ceilings, and the soft hum of the city that never sleeps, the silence between you starts to change. What begins as survival becomes something quieter, steadier—something that almost feels like home.

entry.title: When did you get hot?
entry.summary:
Author: sugarykisses

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,353Chapters: 4/30Kudos: 710

Summary: ──── ❛❛You spent your teenage years pining for your best friend's hot older brother, Dick Grayson. Now that you've finally grown out of your awkward phase, he's slowly noticing you. But while Dick's attention feels like a long-awaited dream, Jason's steady gaze makes you question if you've been chasing the wrong brother all along.❞ read on tumblr: @velvet-milk.

entry.title: The Star that Wouldn't Die
entry.summary:
Author: ShadDork

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 86,869Chapters: 21/29Kudos: 569

Summary: Jason Todd forgot a lot of things after the lazarus pit's putrid green waters helped restore him back to life. Most of it was unimportant information, things that he didn't need to worry about, after all, he could always relearn names, smells, and re-read books. Lost memories weren't as easy to deal with the loss of, but he could always make new ones. The memories that remained were largely traumatic, and the others were slowly being uncovered as time passed. He wished that Dick hadn't said that name, your name. Reigniting feelings and memories. Guilt was already a large part of his existence, and this new guilt about forgetting you entirely was just making everything worse. He shouldn't track you down in case it accidentally put you in danger. But he wanted to make sure that you were okay. It was a battle he lost against himself. As memories resurface and an infuriating case revolving around a club with an asinine name, can he continue to be in your life without dragging you down with him?

entry.title: The Bloom Knot
entry.summary:
Author: nocteris

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 49,395Chapters: 13/22Kudos: 145

Summary: Getting a soulmate was the last thing Jason needed as a young academic getting his PhD. Getting a soulmate was the last thing on your mind as a freshman.But one accidental shove and a falling pitcher of orange juice later, suddenly the both of you are soul bound to someone you’ve just met.Suddenly, you’re everywhere. In his classroom, in his notifications, in every line he reads. Suddenly, he’s everywhere. In the hallways, in the hum of your guitar strings, in the equations you solve.But seeing the others— Dick and Kory, Bruce and Selina, Damian and Jon— they all got to choose their soulmates.So in the eyes of fate, where did that leave the two of you?

entry.title: The House hunger built
entry.summary:
Author: FearTheHime

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 103,971Chapters: 19/?Kudos: 595

Summary: "Of course I eat people, I mean...It's not something I would broadcast since it's...well Gotham and they began to make a phad about it because the citizens are brilliantly...stupid."Bodies are piling up, whatever is left. Families; different backgrounds, different ethnics, religions, looks are being eaten and whatever is left into a master piece. Some sort of art with the remains and everyone was losing time and leads to find out who has been feasting upon Gotham citizens. Jason however, knew of a Cannibal that he totally never mentioned to Bruce. It's not Jason's fault he died before revealing his darkest discovery and that discovery is in the form of a boy he had left behind. [M/N] [L/N]; Mortitan, brilliant, a chef of his own making and conisear of flesh.All Jason needed to do is sweeten the deal in a way that drives all people, after all at the end of the day {M/N] is human after all."Besides..it's people...they are literally born every day..so who cares if a few of them...just disapear once in a while?"

entry.title: Flocked
entry.summary:
Author: Sketchbook_rat

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,086Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 21

Summary: ˖˚⊹ ⋆♡ Y/n was just your average NEET; a broke girlfailure going to college in Gotham City. But then one day, after attempting blackmail and extortion, she got a j*b!?And now all these hot vigilantes are in love with her? What is this, an Otome game?! ♡⋆ ⊹˚˖

entry.title: DEATH DISCO.
entry.summary:
Author: houndwolfz

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,697Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 4

Summary: Batman is dead, and Gotham has been rotting from the inside out since the night he fell. The fragile peace lasted only a few years before the monsters bared their claws again. From the wreckage rose The Guild—a brutal syndicate of assassins that turns murder into a sport, pitting killers against one another to eliminate a single target for prestige and a heavy price on their heads. Under the codename "DEATHKO", you infiltrate the syndicate to burn it to the ground. To survive, you must run with a pack of insane killers hungry for fame and carnage. But one competitor stands above the rest: the notorious Arkham Knight, a man who has had a price on his head for years—the relentless Jason Todd. Ruthless and bound by no rules, Jason is your greatest threat and your only hope for survival. But you aren't the only one with secrets. Jason isn't looking for redemption; he’s hunting for blood. In the heart of the chaos, a distorted bond forms—one that threatens to break you both permanently. It all comes down to one question that could change everything: If you loved Jason Todd... WAS THAT A FACT, OR A WEAPON?

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
  • Major Character Death
